rules.rule_text:
title: Smartscreen Disabled
id: ccdb251c-d767-495d-ae78-761c2c09cc1a
description: Disabling smartscreen could be done as a defense evasion technique before
  a malicious binary is executed. Also known as a Mark-of-the-Web (MOTW) bypass.
references:
- https://www.winhelponline.com/blog/bypass-smartscreen-even-if-its-enabled-through-group-policy/
status: test
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: 2024-08-19
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: registry_set
detection:
  selection:
    TargetObject|endswith: \NoSmartScreen
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1553.005
